scripts.build: npm run context:check && npm run design:check && tsc && node scripts/copy-static.mjs
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run db:init && npm run start
scripts.test: npm run build && node --env-file=.env --test dist/tests/password.test.js dist/tests/jwt.test.js dist/tests/media-validator.test.js dist/tests/design-profile.test.js dist/tests/context.test.js
